title: Notification: Sub-section (3) of section 1 of the Companies Act, 2013(18 of 2013)
description: Notification: Sub-section (3) of section 1 of the Companies Act, 2013(18 of 2013)
text: jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2169] ubZ fnYyh] lkseokj] flrEcj 5] 2016@Hkkæ 14, 1938 No. 2169] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 5, 2016/BHADRA 14, 1938 कारपोरे ट कायᭅ मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 5 िसतंबर, 2016 का.आ. 2866(अ).—कᱶᮤीय सरकार कंपनी अिधिनयम, 2013 (2013 का 18) कᳱ ध ारा 1 कᳱ उपधारा (3) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए 7 िसतंबर, 2016 को वह तारीख िनयुᲦ करती है जबᳰक उᲦ अिधिनयम कᳱ धारा 124, धारा 125 कᳱ उपधारा (1) से (4), (6) [िविनधानकताᭅ िशᭃा और संरᭃा िनिध के ᮧशासन कᳱ रीित के संबंध मᱶ] और उपधारा (8) से (11) के उपबंध ᮧवृᱫ हᲂगे। [फा. सं. 5/27/2013-आईईपीएफ (पाटᭅ)] अमरदीप ᳲसह भाᳯटया, संयुᲦ सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th September, 2016 S.O. 2866(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 1 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby appoints 7th September, 2016 as the date on which the provisions of section 124, sub-sections (1) to (4), (6) [with respect to the manner of administration of the Investor Education and Protection Fund] and (8) to (11) of section 125 of the said Act shall come into force. [F. No. 5/27/2013-IEPF (Part)] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy. 4291 GI/2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
